package handler

import (
    "net/http"

    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

var Engine *gin.Engine

func RegisterAdminRoutes(engine *gin.Engine, db *gorm.DB) {
    repo := NewUserRepository(db)
    repo.Query().Where("status = ?", "active").First(&struct{}{})
    engine.GET("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {})
    engine.GET("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {})
    engine.GET("/debug/pprof", func(c *gin.Context) {})
    StartWorker()
    StartCron()
    db.AutoMigrate(&struct{}{})
    engine.Run()
}

func BuildRoutes(engine *gin.Engine) {
    client := NewUserService()
    other := NewUserService()
    _ = client
    _ = other
    engine.POST("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
        c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
    })
}
